name: Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried kidney beans, cooked, unsalted, drained
2 tbsp Bean cooking liquid or water
2 cups Lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
Makes 2 servings of about 2-3/4 cups each.
406 calories per serving with bean cooking liquid,
390 calories per serving with water
1. Cook beef and onion until beef is well browned. Drain the excess fat.
Stir in flour.
2. Stir in beans, tomato puree, bean cooking liquid or water, and seasonings.
3. Cook over low heat until thickened, about 10 minutes.
4. Mix lettuce, tomato chunks, and green pepper.
5. To serve, place half of the lettuce mixture (about 1 - 1/2 cups) on each plate.
Mound half of the beef mixture (about 3/4 cup) in the center of the lettuce mixture.
Sprinkle crumbled cornmeal chips over the beef mixture. Serve immediately.
